Title: Pay and save (tokenizing the card)
Content:
You need to be fully PCI-DSS level 1 compliant to be allowed to do full PAN integrations

Reach out to Xendit support in case you would like to see this flow activated, we will ask you to provide proof of PCI-DSS compliance.

This guide is applicable for PCI-DSS level 1 compliant merchants who store their card details with Xendit.

These scenarios all create tokens, which can be used in follow up transactions.

This describes how to create at token for one of the following scenarios:

  • One click (store a card for a customer, for customer initiated transactions)

  • Using a stored card (token) for a transaction

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests 

{
  "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
            "card_number": "4000000000001091",
            "cvn": "123",
            "cardholder_first_name": "cardHolderFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "cardHolderLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "edrich@xendit.co",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description example",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "Your meta data"
  }
}

Response - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    ....
    "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
    "actions": [
        {
            "type": "REDIRECT_CUSTOMER",
            "descriptor": "WEB_URL",
            "value": "https://redirect.xendit.co/authentications/68c3b6cef51176d7246173ea/render?api_key=xnd_public_development_kSJeNzbAo6DEkX1poFWVLBsmR0nJ8WnjpdQpf4dfIPXgDBltJmH7CZGVUfWWI"
        }
    ]
}

2. Store the payment_request_id and redirect to the authentication page

Redirect your customer to the authentication page provided by the action_url from the response object. This is where the cardholder completes the 3D Secure authentication.

3. Customer completes authentication

After successfully authenticating, your customer will be redirected to your success_return_url. If authentication fails, they will be redirected to your failure_return_url.

4. Receive the webhook

Xendit will send a payment webhook to your configured webhook endpoint, indicating the final status of the transaction. You can match this webhook with the payment_request_id you stored earlier.

When successful, this response will contain a payment_token_id which you can use for follow up transactions.

Retrieving the card token

If the payment is successful the card token will be retrievable by listening to the webhook and is called payment_token_id.

It can also be retrieved by making a GET request with the payment_request_id to /v3/payment_requests.

Request - GET /v3/payment_requests/YOUR_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID

Response

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-YOUR_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "created": "2025-09-10T05:59:42.148Z",
    "updated": "2025-09-10T06:00:05.032Z",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "latest_payment_id": "py-YOUR_PAYMENT_ID",
    //....
    //This is the field needed for follow up transactions:
    "payment_token_id": "pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", 
    "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
    "actions": []
}

Follow up transaction using a token:

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests (this sample request, skips authentication (3DS)).

{
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "request_amount": 300000,
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "type": "PAY",
    "payment_token_id":"pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID",
    "channel_properties": {
        "skip_three_ds": true,
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure"
    }
}

This will lead to an authentication or, in this case of skip_three_ds: true a transaction.

Response - POST /v3/payment_requests 

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    ....
    "channel_properties": {
        ....
        "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence": "SUBSEQUENT"
    },
    "payment_token_id": "pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", // The payment token ID used in the payment request
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": []
}

Title: Bayar dan simpan (tokenisasi kartu)
Content:
Anda harus sepenuhnya patuh pada PCI-DSS level 1 untuk diizinkan melakukan integrasi PAN penuh

Hubungi dukungan Xendit jika Anda ingin alur ini diaktifkan, kami akan meminta Anda untuk memberikan bukti kepatuhan PCI-DSS.

Panduan ini berlaku untuk merchant yang patuh pada PCI-DSS level 1 yang menyimpan detail kartu mereka dengan Xendit.

Skenario-skenario ini semuanya membuat token, yang dapat digunakan dalam transaksi berikutnya.

Ini menjelaskan cara membuat token untuk salah satu skenario berikut:

  • Satu klik (simpan kartu untuk pelanggan, untuk transaksi yang diinisiasi oleh pelanggan)

  • Menggunakan kartu yang tersimpan (token) untuk transaksi

Permintaan - POST /v3/payment_requests 

{
  "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
            "card_number": "4000000000001091",
            "cvn": "123",
            "cardholder_first_name": "cardHolderFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "cardHolderLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "edrich@xendit.co",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description example",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "Your meta data"
  }
}

Respons - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    ....
    "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
    "actions": [
        {
            "type": "REDIRECT_CUSTOMER",
            "descriptor": "WEB_URL",
            "value": "https://redirect.xendit.co/authentications/68c3b6cef51176d7246173ea/render?api_key=xnd_public_development_kSJeNzbAo6DEkX1poFWVLBsmR0nJ8WnjpdQpf4dfIPXgDBltJmH7CZGVUfWWI"
        }
    ]
}

2. Simpan payment_request_id dan arahkan ke halaman autentikasi

Arahkan pelanggan Anda ke halaman autentikasi yang disediakan oleh action_url dari objek respons. Di sinilah pemegang kartu menyelesaikan autentikasi 3D Secure.

3. Pelanggan menyelesaikan autentikasi

Setelah berhasil melakukan autentikasi, pelanggan Anda akan diarahkan ke success_return_url Anda. Jika autentikasi gagal, mereka akan diarahkan ke failure_return_url Anda.

4. Terima webhook

Xendit akan mengirimkan webhook pembayaran ke endpoint webhook yang telah Anda konfigurasikan, yang menunjukkan status akhir transaksi. Anda dapat mencocokkan webhook ini dengan payment_request_id yang Anda simpan sebelumnya.

Jika berhasil, respons ini akan berisi payment_token_id yang dapat Anda gunakan untuk transaksi berikutnya.

Mengambil token kartu

Jika pembayaran berhasil, token kartu akan dapat diambil dengan mendengarkan webhook dan disebut payment_token_id.

Token ini juga dapat diambil dengan membuat permintaan GET dengan payment_request_id ke /v3/payment_requests.

Permintaan - GET /v3/payment_requests/YOUR_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID

Respons

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-YOUR_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "created": "2025-09-10T05:59:42.148Z",
    "updated": "2025-09-10T06:00:05.032Z",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "latest_payment_id": "py-YOUR_PAYMENT_ID",
    //....
    //Ini adalah field yang dibutuhkan untuk transaksi berikutnya:
    "payment_token_id": "pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", 
    "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
    "actions": []
}

Transaksi lanjutan menggunakan token:

Permintaan - POST /v3/payment_requests (contoh permintaan ini, melewati autentikasi (3DS)).

{
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "request_amount": 300000,
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "type": "PAY",
    "payment_token_id":"pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID",
    "channel_properties": {
        "skip_three_ds": true,
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure"
    }
}

Ini akan mengarah pada autentikasi atau, dalam kasus skip_three_ds: true, sebuah transaksi.

Respons - POST /v3/payment_requests 

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    ....
    "channel_properties": {
        ....
        "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence": "SUBSEQUENT"
    },
    "payment_token_id": "pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", // ID token pembayaran yang digunakan dalam permintaan pembayaran
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": []
}

Title:
**Pay and save (tokenizing the card)**

Based on the search results, the concept is "Pay and Save" which involves "tokenizing the card."

*   **Pay and save** is a specific feature/use case title in Xendit documentation (Document Title: Pay and Save).
*   **Tokenizing the card** is the technical process (card tokenization).

The most professional and accurate translation for this context in Thai is:

**ชำระเงินและบันทึกบัตร (การสร้างโทเคนบัตร)**
Content:
คุณต้องปฏิบัติตามมาตรฐาน PCI-DSS level 1 อย่างสมบูรณ์จึงจะได้รับอนุญาตให้ทำการเชื่อมต่อแบบ full PAN ได้

โปรดติดต่อฝ่ายสนับสนุนของ Xendit หากคุณต้องการเปิดใช้งานขั้นตอนการทำงานนี้ เราจะขอให้คุณแสดงหลักฐานการปฏิบัติตามมาตรฐาน PCI-DSS

คู่มือนี้ใช้ได้สำหรับร้านค้าที่ปฏิบัติตามมาตรฐาน PCI-DSS level 1 ซึ่งจัดเก็บรายละเอียดบัตรของตนไว้กับ Xendit

สถานการณ์เหล่านี้ทั้งหมดจะสร้าง tokens ซึ่งสามารถนำไปใช้ในการทำธุรกรรมครั้งถัดไปได้

นี่คือคำอธิบายวิธีการสร้าง token สำหรับสถานการณ์ใดสถานการณ์หนึ่งดังต่อไปนี้:

  • One click (จัดเก็บบัตรสำหรับลูกค้า สำหรับธุรกรรมที่เริ่มต้นโดยลูกค้า)

  • การใช้บัตรที่จัดเก็บไว้ (token) สำหรับการทำธุรกรรม

คำขอ - POST /v3/payment_requests 

{
  "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
            "card_number": "4000000000001091",
            "cvn": "123",
            "cardholder_first_name": "cardHolderFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "cardHolderLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "edrich@xendit.co",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description example",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "Your meta data"
  }
}

การตอบกลับ - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    ....
    "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
    "actions": [
        {
            "type": "REDIRECT_CUSTOMER",
            "descriptor": "WEB_URL",
            "value": "https://redirect.xendit.co/authentications/68c3b6cef51176d7246173ea/render?api_key=xnd_public_development_kSJeNzbAo6DEkX1poFWVLBsmR0nJ8WnjpdQpf4dfIPXgDBltJmH7CZGVUfWWI"
        }
    ]
}

2. จัดเก็บ payment_request_id และเปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยังหน้า authentication

เปลี่ยนเส้นทางลูกค้าของคุณไปยัง หน้า authentication ที่ระบุโดย action_url จากออบเจกต์การตอบกลับ นี่คือจุดที่ผู้ถือบัตรทำการยืนยันตัวตน 3D Secure ให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์

3. ลูกค้าทำการ authentication เสร็จสมบูรณ์

หลังจากทำการ authentication สำเร็จ ลูกค้าของคุณจะถูกเปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยัง success_return_url ของคุณ หาก authentication ล้มเหลว ลูกค้าจะถูกเปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยัง failure_return_url ของคุณ

4. รับ webhook

Xendit จะส่ง payment webhook ไปยัง webhook endpoint ที่คุณกำหนดค่าไว้ เพื่อระบุสถานะสุดท้ายของธุรกรรม คุณสามารถจับคู่ webhook นี้กับ payment_request_id ที่คุณจัดเก็บไว้ก่อนหน้านี้ได้

เมื่อสำเร็จ การตอบกลับนี้จะมี payment_token_id ซึ่งคุณสามารถใช้สำหรับ follow up transactions ได้

การเรียกดู card token

หากการชำระเงินสำเร็จ card token จะสามารถเรียกดูได้โดยการรับฟัง webhook และจะถูกเรียกว่า payment_token_id

นอกจากนี้ยังสามารถเรียกดูได้โดยการส่งคำขอ GET พร้อมกับ payment_request_id ไปยัง /v3/payment_requests

คำขอ - GET /v3/payment_requests/YOUR_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID

การตอบกลับ

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-YOUR_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "created": "2025-09-10T05:59:42.148Z",
    "updated": "2025-09-10T06:00:05.032Z",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "latest_payment_id": "py-YOUR_PAYMENT_ID",
    //....
    //This is the field needed for follow up transactions:
    "payment_token_id": "pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", 
    "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
    "actions": []
}

Follow up transaction โดยใช้ token:

คำขอ - POST /v3/payment_requests (คำขอตัวอย่างนี้ ข้าม authentication (3DS))

{
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "request_amount": 300000,
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "type": "PAY",
    "payment_token_id":"pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID",
    "channel_properties": {
        "skip_three_ds": true,
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure"
    }
}

สิ่งนี้จะนำไปสู่ authentication หรือในกรณีของ skip_three_ds: true จะนำไปสู่ transaction

การตอบกลับ - POST /v3/payment_requests 

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    ....
    "channel_properties": {
        ....
        "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence": "SUBSEQUENT"
    },
    "payment_token_id": "pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", // The payment token ID used in the payment request
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": []
}
SeoTitle:
**Pay and save (tokenizing the card)**

Based on the search results, the concept is "Pay and Save" which involves "tokenizing the card."

*   **Pay and save** is a specific feature/use case title in Xendit documentation (Document Title: Pay and Save).
*   **Tokenizing the card** is the technical process (card tokenization).

The most professional and accurate translation for this context in Thai is:

**ชำระเงินและบันทึกบัตร (การสร้างโทเคนบัตร)**

Title: Pagar y guardar (tokenizando la tarjeta)
Content:
Usted necesita tener un cumplimiento total de nivel 1 de PCI-DSS para que se le permita realizar integraciones completas de PAN

Comuníquese con el soporte de Xendit en caso de que desee que se active este flujo; le solicitaremos que proporcione una prueba de cumplimiento de PCI-DSS.

Esta guía es aplicable para comercios con cumplimiento de nivel 1 de PCI-DSS que almacenan los detalles de sus tarjetas con Xendit.

Todos estos escenarios crean tokens, que pueden usarse en transacciones de seguimiento.

Esto describe cómo crear un *token* para uno de los siguientes escenarios:

  • Un clic (almacenar una tarjeta para un Cliente, para transacciones iniciadas por el Cliente)

  • Usar una tarjeta almacenada (token) para una Transacción

Solicitud - POST /v3/payment_requests 

{
  "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
            "card_number": "4000000000001091",
            "cvn": "123",
            "cardholder_first_name": "cardHolderFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "cardHolderLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "edrich@xendit.co",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description example",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "Your meta data"
  }
}

Respuesta - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    ....
    "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
    "actions": [
        {
            "type": "REDIRECT_CUSTOMER",
            "descriptor": "WEB_URL",
            "value": "https://redirect.xendit.co/authentications/68c3b6cef51176d7246173ea/render?api_key=xnd_public_development_kSJeNzbAo6DEkX1poFWVLBsmR0nJ8WnjpdQpf4dfIPXgDBltJmH7CZGVUfWWI"
        }
    ]
}

2. Almacene el payment_request_id y redirija a la página de authentication

Redirija a su Cliente a la página de authentication proporcionada por el action_url del objeto de la response. Aquí es donde el titular de la tarjeta completa la authentication 3D Secure.

3. El Cliente completa la authentication

Después de autenticarse exitosamente, su Cliente será redirigido a su success_return_url. Si la authentication falla, será redirigido a su failure_return_url.

4. Recibir el webhook

Xendit enviará un webhook de Pago a su endpoint de webhook configurado, indicando el estado final de la Transacción. Usted puede hacer coincidir este webhook con el payment_request_id que almacenó anteriormente.

Cuando sea exitoso, esta response contendrá un payment_token_id que usted puede usar para transacciones de seguimiento.

Obtener el token de la tarjeta

Si el Pago es exitoso, el *token* de la tarjeta se podrá obtener al escuchar el webhook y se llama payment_token_id.

También se puede obtener haciendo una *request* GET con el payment_request_id a /v3/payment_requests.

Solicitud - GET /v3/payment_requests/YOUR_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID

Respuesta

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-YOUR_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "created": "2025-09-10T05:59:42.148Z",
    "updated": "2025-09-10T06:00:05.032Z",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "latest_payment_id": "py-YOUR_PAYMENT_ID",
    //....
    //This is the field needed for follow up transactions:
    "payment_token_id": "pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", 
    "type": "PAY_AND_SAVE",
    "actions": []
}

Transacción de seguimiento usando un token:

Solicitud - POST /v3/payment_requests (esta *request* de ejemplo omite la authentication (3DS)).

{
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "request_amount": 300000,
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "type": "PAY",
    "payment_token_id":"pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID",
    "channel_properties": {
        "skip_three_ds": true,
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure"
    }
}

Esto conducirá a una authentication o, en este caso de skip_three_ds: true, a una Transacción.

Respuesta - POST /v3/payment_requests 

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    ....
    "channel_properties": {
        ....
        "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence": "SUBSEQUENT"
    },
    "payment_token_id": "pt-YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", // The payment token ID used in the payment request
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": []
}
